summary_en: 175,000 shares acquired (100% of 175k-share authorization) at ¥124.67M cumulative cost (83.1% of ¥150M ceiling). Acquisition period: 24 Mar – 22 May 2026. Final block: 94,700 shares at ¥64.67M (1 – 22 May 2026). Method: open-market purchase via discretionary contract. Program concluded.
title_en: Notice regarding Status of Acquisition of Treasury Stock and Completion of Acquisition
translation_en_brief:
Emimen Co., Ltd. filed a completion notice for its treasury stock acquisition program on 25 May 2026. The board authorized acquisition of up to 175,000 shares at a maximum cost of ¥150 million over the period 24 March – 30 June 2026, to be executed via open-market purchase under a discretionary contract.

As of 22 May 2026, the company had acquired all 175,000 authorized shares at a cumulative cost of ¥124.67 million, representing 83.1% of the ¥150 million ceiling. The final block, acquired between 1 – 22 May, consisted of 94,700 shares at ¥64.67 million. The program has concluded.
